
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my current position and perception, I see multiple objects on what appears to be a table surface. The scene is somewhat distant, so I should first get a closer look to identify which object matches the description of being blue and circular. I'll move closer to the center of the objects \(near P12\) and then use Look to get a better view.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 0.86,
  "z": -0.81
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762983009441, 'end': 1762983018937, 'elapsed': 9496}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 654.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Walk` → `{'t0': 2322075, 't1': 2322729, 'elapsed': 654}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6374, completion=172, total=6546
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=\-0.65, y=0.08, z=\-0.81\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now that I'm closer to the objects, I'll use Look to get a clearer view of the items on the table.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -0.85
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762983019597, 'end': 1762983026257, 'elapsed': 6660}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1383.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 2329395, 't1': 2330778, 'elapsed': 1383}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6579, completion=127, total=6706
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the updated perception, I can now clearly see a blue circular object with tag 4 that matches the description. This appears to be the only blue circular item in the scene. Based on this visual confirmation, I will proceed to pick up object 4.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "4"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762983027648, 'end': 1762983039472, 'elapsed': 11824}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 702.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 2342611, 't1': 2343313, 'elapsed': 702}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8296, completion=115, total=8411
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object 4

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular object you requested. The object was tagged as number 4 in the scene, and I could clearly identify it as the only item matching your description of being both blue and circular in shape.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>
